name: Ariel Vernaza
jobTitle: Full-stack Software Engineer · AI Specialist · Founder · Game Designer · RocketRide Core Maintainer
summary: I'm Ariel Vernaza — a full-stack software engineer specialized in Artificial Intelligence, a Panamanian founder and game designer based in Madrid, Spain, and a core maintainer of RocketRide, the open-source AI-native pipeline engine, where I build agentic flow control, tooling and multi-model pipelines in C++. Over a decade I've led teams and shipped production software — mobile apps, marketplaces, payment and IoT systems, and AI platforms — and taught Artificial Intelligence at university level. I hold a Master's in Game Design on top of a Master's in Computer Science specialized in AI, and I move fluently across Python, C++, TypeScript, Ruby on Rails and React, and across the whole agentic stack (agents, LLM orchestration, evals). When I'm not shipping agents, I'm designing games — pixel art, engines and mechanics — practicing kendo, or playing action RPGs.

experience.description: Core maintainer of RocketRide, the open-source AI-native pipeline engine powered by a high-performance C++ core. I build agentic flow control (flow_if, flow_while), agent tooling, evaluation and tracing, and multi-model pipelines that ship AI features to production at an efficient token cost. This is my main focus.

I lead an agentic development studio building games, enterprise software, telemetry platforms and integrations — from zero to production. I architect scalable systems, design agentic AI modules and orchestrate multi-model pipelines on RocketRide, working directly with clients across the US and LATAM.

Senior Software Engineer building and scaling employee-benefits and e-commerce platforms within the Aon group. I work on high-traffic backend services, integrations and reliability, applying AI where it moves the product forward.
Bridged AI innovation with engineering execution, delivering production-ready R&D platforms and data intelligence pipelines. Prototyped and hardened AI systems from research into shippable product.

Developed and released the Transfix Mobile App using Ruby on Rails and React Native. Managed cross-team communication, integrated new map providers via GraphQL, and led the rebranding of the 'My Loads' and 'Load Details' pages using React, TypeScript, Rails, Postgres, Docker, Kubernetes and GraphQL.

Designed a C++ artificial-vision method for a Jetson Nano to process image sequences from a rotating camera and generate a 3D point cloud, using OpenCV for feature detection and calibration to enhance 3D object reconstruction.

Specialized in Python, Django, GraphQL, Postgres and Kubernetes. Led the integration with the OXXO payment system in Mexico and DataCrédito in Colombia, and built an MVP for small businesses with Cervecería Nacional de Panamá.
Automated purchase-order processing using Ruby on Rails, Python, NLP, regression models and Kafka. Built an advanced purchase-order processing system and integrated it with client ERP systems.
Taught advanced AI and simulation courses using Python, Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras and OpenCV. Led research on integrating intelligent agents with physical robots and control systems.

education.institution: Escuela Superior de Arte y Diseño de Andalucía

education.degree: Master’s in Computer Science and Technology, specialized in Artificial Intelligence
